batch_summary.note: Feb 2026: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S011 Sev-2 — Feb 15 amplification sequence, Level C. Final arc signal. Arc ACTIVE unresolved at dataset close (11 signals).

primary_flags.cross_rf: RF-04 (COMP-RF04-029 Feb 15 amplification B-030; ARC-RF04-001 signal)
primary_flags.message_text: Feb 15 2026 amplification sequence: Eli admitted raising voice → Melissa's framing: verbal abuse → traumatized child → drinking problem → ongoing alcoholism allegation
primary_flags.summary: Feb 2026: Melissa amplifies an admitted fact (Eli raising his voice during a domestic argument while Olivia was present) through a sustained escalation sequence into qualitatively different characterizations. Admitted fact: Eli raised his voice during an argument (Feb 15 2026). Amplification sequence documented in RF-04 COMP-RF04-029: (1) raised voice acknowledged → (2) reframed as 'verbal abuse' → (3) 'traumatized child' framing → (4) 'drinking problem' characterization → (5) sustained 'alcoholism' allegation deployed through Apr 5 2026 (ongoing visit-refusal engine). Evidence Level C per ADD-001: event rewrite — the admitted fact (raised voice) is qualitatively different from the amplified characterizations (verbal abuse, traumatized, alcoholism). Sev-2 elevation: the amplification produces a sustained visit-refusal justification that drives Phase C behavior through dataset close. ADD-001 Sev-2 criteria: event rewrite of 'significant' event (Level C high-significance) — this amplification sequence becomes the primary visit-refusal engine in Phase C. Q4 calibration: no prior written statements from Melissa acknowledging Eli had never been physically violent (which would create Level A anchor). This is therefore Level C (not Level A-B). ADD-003 compound: amplification sequence occurs within sustained DARVO cluster (RF-04 B-030 primary) → RF-09+RF-04 COMP-RF09-008. Note: Eli confirmed the admitted incident at CP2 (Q4). The distortion is not the incident itself but the amplification chain from one admitted incident to alcoholism allegations sustained for 7+ weeks.

arc_updates.event: S011 signal added; final primary signal; arc unresolved at dataset close
